summary: Reframed the opening around Hester's jars so Chapter 3 no longer mirrors Chapter 4's dawn-at-work entry, and sharpened the closing line toward paper-driven pressure to improve the handoff into the next chapter's bank scene without changing chapter beats.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to start on the jars and Hester's private resolve instead of another early-morning workplace entrance.
Adjusted the final sentence to echo the paper-versus-ground conflict that leads into August's bank-focused chapter.
Checked for style-bible calibration lines appearing verbatim; none were present in the chapter text.
